description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with stages mirror, build:win, build:linux, and deploy:both. In the mirror stage add a "Mirror to gh" job using the registry.gitlab.com/nickdonnelly/horus/git-mirror:latest image that runs git-mirror "${CI_PROJECT_DIR}" git@github.com:${GITHUB_REPOSITORY} to push the repository to GitHub. In the build:win stage add a "Build Windows" job using haffmans/mingw-qt5:latest image, limited to master and staging branches, that runs x86_64-w64-mingw32-qmake-qt5 horus.pro and make -j7, and stores the resulting build/* artifacts for 1 week. In the build:linux stage add a "Build Linux" job using rabits/qt:5.10-desktop image, also only on master and staging, that runs export QMAKE_CXXFLAGS="-std=c++14", sudo apt-get -qq update, qmake horus.pro, and make -j4, and archives build/* for 1 week. In the deploy:both stage add a "Deploy both platforms" job using nickdonnelly/deploy_horus image, only on master, that extracts VERSION from app/horus.cpp, zips the Linux and Windows binaries, and uploads them via req post to https://horus.donnelly.cc/dist/deploy/new/linux/${VERSION} and https://horus.donnelly.cc/dist/deploy/new/win64/${VERSION} with x-deployment-key and x-api-key headers.
